app.title: Booking App
app.tempPasswordInstruction: Your account was created with a temporary password. Please set a new secure password to continue.

home.title: Athletic Schedule
home.subtitle: Master your discipline. Book your next session.
home.welcomeAdminTitle: Welcome to your new booking platform! 🚀
home.welcomeAdminText: Let's schedule your first course so your athletes can start booking! You can create a course by clicking any time slot on the calendar below, or using the quick setup button.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your athletic journey
dashboard.emptySchedule: Ready to train? Your schedule is empty.
dashboard.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?

course.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel "{title}"? This will automatically unbook all participants and mark the course as cancelled.
course.descriptionPlaceholder: Details about the workout, equipment, etc.
course.applyToSeries: Apply changes to the entire series
course.noCoursesFound: No courses found matching your criteria.
course.removeParticipantConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this course?
course.cancelledNotBookable: This session has been cancelled and is currently not bookable.
course.inactiveAccountRestricted: Your account is currently inactive and cannot book or unbook sessions.
course.youAreCoach: You are the coach for this session.
course.loginToBook: Please login to book a course

cycle.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete category '{name}'?
cycle.infoTitle: How does the training cycle work? 💡
cycle.infoPaletteText: Select a category from the left palette (or create a new one) and click any time cell in the right grid to assign training days.
cycle.infoImpactText: Assigned categories are highlighted with their respective colors on the course calendar. When athletes book a course, they will see the specific category focus directly on that calendar day.

users.title: User Management
users.passwordResetDetail: The user has been reset and requires a new password on next login.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user '{name}'?
users.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
users.tempPasswordNote: This will be the password for the first login.
users.resetPasswordConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the password for {name}? They will be forced to change it on their next login.

mail.placeholdersNote: You can use the following placeholders in your templates: {user_name}, {company_name}.
mail.welcomeMailNote: This email is sent automatically when a new user registers or is created by an admin.
mail.previewPlaceholder: Preview will appear here as you type...
mail.membershipWelcomeMailNote: This email is automatically sent when a user successfully subscribes to a paid membership. Use this to provide essential onboarding information, company rules, or access details.
mail.membershipWelcomeMailNoteManual: This email can be manually sent to trial users in the user management view.
mail.noMembershipWelcomeAttachments: No attachments for Membership Welcome Mail.

meetup.title: Title *
meetup.notifyMembers: Notify all community members via email
meetup.placeholderDescription: Tell us more about the activity...
meetup.placeholderLocation: Physical address or Link (e.g. Google Maps)
meetup.placeholderLink: e.g. https://hotel.com or Google Maps link
meetup.noCommentsYet: No comments yet. Start the conversation!
meetup.planningPhaseNote: Leave dates blank to create a planning meetup. You can discuss the details with the community before fixing the final date.
meetup.useCommentsToDiscuss: Use comments to coordinate and vote on dates!
meetup.viewParticipants: Click to view full participant list
meetup.rsvpDeadlineTooltip: Deadline for members to confirm their attendance.
meetup.communitySubtitle: Discover and organize casual gatherings with your community.
meetup.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this meetup?

error.deadlineAfterEvent: Deadline must be before the event date.

onboarding.setupUnlock: Complete your setup to unlock the full potential of your training journey.

profileUpdate.title: Complete Profile
profileUpdate.description: Update your name, gender, and emergency contact info to stay safe.

firstBooking.title: Book Your First Course
firstBooking.description: Find a session in the calendar and reserve your spot with a single click.

exploreMeetups.title: Explore Community Meetups
exploreMeetups.description: Connect with other athletes by joining or creating social meetups.

personalBests.title: Log Personal Bests
personalBests.description: Track your strength and performance progress by logging your max weights.

leaderboard.title: Check the Rankings
leaderboard.description: See how you stack up against others on the leaderboard (and make your profile public!).

adminSettings.title: Configure Company Settings
adminSettings.description: Set up your company profile, branding, and general preferences.

adminPayments.title: Setup Stripe Payments
adminPayments.description: Connect your Stripe account to enable automated membership fees.

adminUsers.title: Manage Members & Trainers
adminUsers.description: Create your trainer staff and onboard athletes into your database.

adminCourses.title: Create Your First Course
adminCourses.description: Schedule a new class or course series on the calendar page.

participants.title: Participants
participants.empty: No participants have joined this squad yet.
participants.name: Name
participants.gdprWarning: Accessing sensitive personal data is strictly logged for GDPR compliance. Only access this in case of actual emergency.

auth.accountCreated: Account created! We've sent a verification link to {email}.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.verificationLinkResent: A new verification link has been sent to your email.
auth.couldNotResendEmail: Could not resend verification email. Please try again later.
auth.fillFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields.
auth.agreeTermsError: You must agree to the terms and privacy policy to register.
auth.reviewTerms: Please review and accept your company's legal terms.
auth.confirmDetails: Confirm your details to set up your company.
auth.verifyEmailInstruction: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please click the link to activate your account.
auth.registerModeLabel: What would you like to do?
auth.modeCreateDesc: Create a new company workspace to set up schedules and manage athletes.
auth.modeJoinDesc: Register as an athlete or trainer to book classes at an existing company.
auth.joinWarningText: You are joining the company as a trial member and can book courses after approval or configuration.
auth.modeLockedByLink: Join mode has been preselected via invitation link.
auth.companyNameJoin: Name of the company you wish to join
auth.companyAlreadyExists: A company named '{company}' already exists. Please choose a different name or switch to join mode.
auth.companyNotFoundForJoin: The company '{company}' was not found. Please check the spelling.
auth.newCompanyWelcomeText: You are about to create the new company '{company}'. You will be registered as the administrator and can create your course schedule, manage coaches, and invite your athletes in the next step!
auth.newCompanyAdminHint: As an administrator, you have full access to the platform and can customize all settings.
auth.joinCompanyWelcomeText: You are about to join the company '{company}'. You will start as a trial member and can book courses at your company once registered.

versionUpdate.available: A new version of the app is available.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.

trial.title: You are on a Trial Period
trial.subtitle: Upgrade now to unlock the full potential of your training.

unlimited.title: Unlimited Bookings
unlimited.desc: Book as many courses as you want every month.

pb.title: Personal Best Tracking
pb.desc: Record and visualize your progress over time.

rankings.title: Community Rankings
rankings.desc: See where you stand on the leaderboard.

stats.title: Advanced Statistics
stats.desc: Detailed analysis of your training performance.

pricing.title: Full Access
pricing.subtitle: Everything you need to succeed.
pricing.securePayment: Secure payment via Stripe. No hidden costs. Cancel anytime.

actions.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will still have access until the end of your current billing period.
actions.cancelSuccess: Your subscription has been cancelled and will not renew.

profile.privateProfileNote: Your stats and PBs are hidden from other athletes.
profile.publicProfileNote: When enabled, your stats and PBs are visible to other members.
profile.emergencyConsent: I consent to {company} storing this emergency contact information for use in case of an actual emergency.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
profile.consentRequiredNote: Please confirm the emergency contact storage consent.

pb.title: Personal Bests
pb.noRecords: No records yet. Start logging your workouts!
pb.fillFields: Please fill in all fields correctly.
pb.logFailed: Failed to log PB. Please try again.
pb.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
pb.subtitle: Your progress at a glance
pb.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this PB entry?

leaderboard.title: Rankings
leaderboard.subtitle: Push your limits and see how you stack up.
leaderboard.privateProfileNotice: Your profile is currently **private**. Your stats and PBs are hidden from other athletes.
leaderboard.noRecords: No personal bests logged yet. Be the first!

settings.noteCompanyNameLocked: Note: The company name is locked and cannot be changed by administrators.
settings.identityNote: This is your registered company identity used throughout the system.
settings.homepageUrlNote: Add a link to your external homepage website. This link will be displayed as a globe icon next to your company name in the navigation header.
settings.homepageUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (must start with http:// or https://)

onboardingWarning.body: The legal texts (Legal Notice, Terms & Conditions) and welcome email templates have been prefilled with generic placeholder content. These texts are likely not legally compliant for your specific business. Please review and adapt them under the 'Identity', 'Email Templates', and 'Legal' tabs before using them.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your athletic workspace and system preferences

smtp.title: SMTP Configuration
smtp.subtitle: Configure a custom mail server to send system emails for your company.
smtp.enableCustomNote: When enabled, emails will be sent using your configured credentials instead of Bookly.

stripe.title: Stripe Integration
stripe.subtitle: Configure your payment processing, membership fees, and billing cycles.
stripe.connectDesc: Set up payments via Stripe to easily collect memberships and fees from your athletes.
stripe.enablePaymentsNote: Toggle all payment features (subscriptions, fees) on or off system-wide.
stripe.paymentDisabledWarning: When disabled, members will not be prompted to subscribe, and the subscription UI will be hidden from their profiles. Existing trial limits still apply unless manually updated by an admin.
stripe.yearlyFeeNote: Recurring annual fee charged upon registration and every 12 months.
stripe.monthlyFeeNote: Standard recurring monthly subscription fee for all members.
stripe.billingAlignmentNote: Select a specific day of the month for all member subscriptions. New members will be prorated until this day.
stripe.saveSuccess: Settings saved and synced with Stripe
stripe.priceWillBeCreated: Price will be created on save
stripe.feeExplanation: Stripe charges a processing fee per transaction. Below is an estimated breakdown of the fees and your net payout based on standard Stripe rates for European credit cards (1.4% + $0.25) and SEPA Direct Debit (0.8% + $0.25, capped at $5.00).
stripe.viaCreditCard: Payout when paid via Credit Card
stripe.viaSepa: Payout when paid via SEPA Direct Debit

settings.memberPrivacyNote: Your privacy is managed by the course trainers. You can update your personal profile information in the Profile section.
settings.registrationLinkNote: Share this link with new members to make their registration easier. The company name will be pre-filled and locked.
settings.legalNoticeMarkdownNote: You can use Markdown to format your Legal Notice. This will replace the structured fields in the footer if provided.
settings.termsNote: Define your terms of service and usage policies here.
settings.privacyNote: Upload your official Privacy Policy (GDPR) as a PDF file.
settings.legalSettingsNote: You can use Markdown to format your Legal Notice. This will replace the structured fields in the footer if provided.
settings.vatIdNote: VAT ID according to § 27 a UStG:
settings.noTermsDefined: No terms and conditions have been defined yet.
settings.readCarefully: Please read these terms and conditions carefully.
settings.operationsNote: Configure global booking behavior and privacy settings.
settings.showNamesNote: Display full names in the public participant list.
settings.showWaitlistNote: Show the current queue and position to other members.
settings.memberWindowNote: How far in advance members can book sessions.
settings.trialLimitNote: Maximum number of sessions a trial member can book.
settings.autoCancelNote: Automatically cancel classes with low participation a few hours before start.
settings.enableAutoCancelNote: If enabled, the system will check the participant count and cancel the class if needed.
settings.minParticipantsNote: The class will be cancelled if fewer than this number of people signed up.
settings.hoursBeforeNote: When to perform the automatic check and cancellation.
settings.trainerAlertsNote: Manage your personal notifications for course starts.
settings.notifyBeforeNote: Receive an alert when your course is about to begin.

statistics.title: Trainer Statistics
statistics.popularDays: Popularity by Day of the Week

calendar.noSessions: No sessions scheduled for this day.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.description: We use functional cookies to save your preferences like language and to improve your booking experience. Some cookies are essential for the site to work.
cookies.preferencesDesc: You can choose which types of cookies you want to allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the app to function properly.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for site functionality and security.
cookies.analyticalDesc: Helping us understand how the app is used.
cookies.marketingDesc: Used for tailored content and advertisements.

payments.title: Payment & Billing Dashboard
payments.subtitle: Manage subscriptions, billing cycles, and Stripe integration
payments.connectStripeDesc: Connect your Stripe account first to manage subscriptions, collect payments, and view analytics. The "Subscribers" and "Analytics" tabs will unlock once connected.
payments.connectStripeNote: Use the Configuration tab below to set up your Stripe account.
payments.missingAccountIdNote: Stripe Account ID is not configured.
payments.noSubscriptionsFound: No active subscriptions found in Stripe.

monitor.title: Company Monitor
monitor.subtitle: Overview and statistics of all registered companies
monitor.sensitivePersonalDataWarning: Accessing sensitive personal data is strictly logged for GDPR compliance. Please confirm that you really need to access this data for system monitoring.
monitor.noUsersFound: No users found in this company.
monitor.confirmButton: I confirm and want to see the users
monitor.name: Name
monitor.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action is permanent and will delete all associated data (courses, bookings, users, and settings).
monitor.cannotDeleteMoreUsers: Cannot delete: more than 1 user account
